code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE||"http://localhost:8000";const api=axios.create({baseURL:"".concat(API_BASE,"/api")});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{var _window,_window$location;const path=((_window=window)===null||_window===void 0?void 0:(_window$location=_window.location)===null||_window$location===void 0?void 0:_window$location.pathname)||"";const isStaffArea=path.startsWith("/admin")||path.startsWith("/staff");const token=isStaffArea?localStorage.getItem("staff_access_token"):localStorage.getItem("customer_access_token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export default api;
